prestazioni: Engine swap to a stroked AMC 401 V8 (engine code: AMX-401) with forged internals from Eagle Specialty Products, including a 4.125" crankshaft, 6.125" H-beam connecting rods, and Mahle 10.5:1 forged pistons. Pair with a custom camshaft from Comp Cams (280H Magnum, .557/.563 lift, 230/236 duration @ .050) for aggressive mid-to-high RPM power delivery.

Forced induction via a Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285CE turbocharger (85mm, 850hp capable) on a custom tubular exhaust manifold by Stainless Works, with a Turbosmart 60mm wastegate and TiAL MV-R 50mm blow-off valve. Intercooling handled by a PWR 4.5" core front-mount intercooler with custom piping by Vibrant Performance.

Fuel system upgrade featuring dual Aeromotive A1000 fuel pumps, ID1700x injectors, and a Holley Dominator ECU with a custom tune by AMC specialist Mark Heffington. Exhaust system includes 2.5" stainless headers by Hooker Blackheart, a 3.5" dual-exit Flowmaster Super 44 muffler setup, and a custom X-pipe for optimized scavenging.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody conversion kit (REBEL MACHINE-specific, not generic) with custom carbon fiber fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser. Painted in AMC’s original ‘Big Bad Orange’ with matte black accents and a custom gold leaf stripe package by Vintage Airbrushed Graphics.

Suspension overhaul with a full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilover kit (custom valved for the Rebel’s unibody chassis), paired with Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings and a Hellwig front sway bar (1.25"). Wheels: 18x10.5" and 18x12" BBS RS-GT in gold with Nitto NT05R 275/35/18 and 315/30/18 tires.

Interior stripped and reupholstered with Recaro SRD seats (AMC-specific mounting brackets), a custom roll cage by Chassisworks (8-point, mild steel), and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub. Gauges: Defi Advance BF series (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) in a custom A-pillar pod by Dakota Digital.
